articles.title: 10 dead, 4 unaccounted for in fire at auto parts plant in Daejeon
articles.summary: DAEJEON, March 21 (Yonhap) -- Ten people have been killed and four others are still reported missing after the fire.

articles.title: PM calls for government control tower for drone, counter-drone policy
articles.summary: SEOUL, March 20 (Yonhap) -- Prime Minister Kim Min-seok on Friday called for a government control tower for drone and counter-drone policy.

articles.title: State oil firm under audit over foreign-owned oil shipped from S. Korean storage site
articles.summary: SEOUL, March 20 (Yonhap) -- The government launched an audit into the state oil firm over foreign-owned oil shipped from a Korean storage site.
